nodes.label: CLAUDE.md — repo guidance for Claude Code
Next.js 15 App Router (single SPA under web/)
RBAC three personas: Admin / Faculty / Student
Capabilities are the single source of truth (UI never checks role names)
auth_caps(cohort uuid) Postgres SECURITY DEFINER function
Faculty are review-only on submissions; only admins write grades
submissions has no direct cohort_id; filter via assignments!inner(cohort_id)
pods → pod_faculty (one is_primary per pod) → pod_members (one pod per student per cohort)
rpc_pod_faculty_event RPC — atomic pod faculty mutations + audit
Theme: HSL CSS variables in globals.css, persona via data-theme
Convention: data access in lib/queries; no from('…') in components
Deploy via GitHub push only — no Vercel CLI
Vercel project build-with-ai under team gnanalytica, Root web/
Archive README — pre-Next.js plans/specs preserved for history
Pre-Next.js static-HTML era (faculty.html, admin-faculty.html, vanilla ES modules) — ARCHIVED, no longer in tree
Faculty pods, mentor assignment, faculty experience — design spec
nodes.author: sandeep@gnanalytica.com

nodes.label: pod_faculty table with partial unique primary index
pod_members table — one pod per student per cohort
Decision: pods are decoupled from capstone teams
Rationale: a student's teammates may have a different mentor than they do; pods are mentorship grouping, teams are capstone grouping
ARCHIVED design: faculty had full read+write across cohort (later changed to review-only)
admin-pods.html admin UI for pods — ARCHIVED static-HTML page
CSV pod import (student_email,pod_name) with preview diff
ARCHIVED: faculty.html with Today/My pod/Whole cohort/Analytics/Handbook tabs
Student dashboard 'Your mentor' card via my_pod() RPC
Plan 2 — Admin pods UI (static HTML era)
Plan 3 — Faculty landing: Today + Handbook (hash-routed tabs, archived)
Plan 4 — Faculty My pod + Whole cohort tabs
Plan 5 — Analytics tab + student mentor card
Pod-vs-pod and faculty-vs-faculty analytics (inline SVG bar charts)
Role Reorganization + Faculty Guides — Design (5 roles)
ARCHIVED 5-role model: Admin / Trainer / Tech Support / Support Faculty / Executive Faculty (later collapsed to 3 personas)
Hybrid scoping: Gnanalytica roles global multi; college roles per-cohort single
resolveRoles(user, cohortId) replaces checkAdminOrFaculty; returns can.* capability map
can_grade_submission helper — trainer/admin always; support faculty pod-gated
Escalation lanes: Student → Support Faculty → {Tech Support | Trainer}
Retired: faculty-pretraining.html LMS replaced by faculty-guide.html
Rationale: big-bang rollout (no flag) because admin caps are superset of trainer caps so backfill window has no regression
Rationale: progress monitoring intentionally unowned; revisit if students slip
Plan 1 — Role Foundations (additive schema + auth helper)
Rationale: additive migrations only to isolate schema risk from RLS/UI rewrite
